title: sonchus radicatus subsp. gummifer
intro: Sonchus radicatus subsp. gummifer, also known as Spiny Sow Thistle, is a subspecies of the Sonchus radicatus plant, characterized by its prickly leaves and stems. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Sonchus radicatus subsp. gummifer include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
